creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
On 11/22/12, Cpet Services <cpetservice@gmail.com> wrote:
> If it did not have so many man pages I would change it but since it has so
> many renaming 1 man page vs all of them

The number of manpages shouldn't present much of a problem for
renaming.  Many of the manpages have generic names, that (a) don't
clearly indicate to users of apropos(1) that they are associated with
tcl/tk (or what version of tcl/tk); and (b) may conflict with manpages
from other ports, in documentation database name or in actual
location.  It would be far better, in my opinion, to rename all of
them uniformly, using the option that the configure script provides
for that purpose.

b.
